title: Human-Centered Physical AI
subtitle: Building embodied intelligence that augments human capabilities
vision: Develop AI systems that coexist naturally with humans while supporting well-being and societal values.
mission: Advance physical intelligence by integrating embodiment, human-centered design and adaptive AI.
description: Human-Centered Physical AI investigates how robots and embodied systems can perceive, reason and act in real-world human environments.

activities.title: Human-Robot Interaction
activities.description: Designing natural communication between humans and robots.

activities.title: Embodied Agentic AI
activities.description: Developing agents capable of adaptive behavior.

activities.title: Digital Twins
activities.description: Simulation environments for learning and validation.

examples.title: CAREBOT
examples.description: Social assistance robot for elderly support

examples.title: Physical Intelligence Framework
examples.description: Research framework integrating embodiment and values
